problems.cause: AGREE annex is attached to a component type (Vitesse_Air) but the validator cannot resolve AADL package context due to missing or malformed package reference visibility
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the package qualification from the annex owner reference by ensuring the annex is correctly scoped to the component type without external dependency ambiguity

executor_steps: Verify that the AGREE annex is attached directly to the Vitesse_Air component type without any package-qualified prefix in the annex declaration
Ensure no external package references (e.g., autopilot_hard::) are implied or embedded in the AGREE expression — use only visible port names V_Air_Output and Dev_Bus as operands
Confirm the annex syntax is strictly: annex agree {** guarantee "v_air_output_bounds": V_Air_Output >= 0 and V_Air_Output <= 100; **};
Revalidate the AADL model with explicit inclusion of all 'with' clauses in the package declaration, ensuring Base_Types is visible (already present)
